title: World Spas
subTitle: The host sheds light on the Zara spa at the Mövenpick Hotel, which is an oasis of luxury in the barren expanse of Amman, Jordan.

title: Heritage
subTitle: The host sheds light on the Stonehenge, a prehistoric upright monumental structure in England, whilst highlighting its historical significance.

title: Landmarks
subTitle: The host provides deeper insights into a renowned floating market that attracts tourists in large numbers whilst highlighting businesses functioning over there.

title: Quest
subTitle: Alex Outhwaite meets the descendants of the royal families of Hyderabad and Lucknow, and they tell her about the culture and cuisine of both kingdoms.

title: Backpack
subTitle: Sommer tries kayaking and scuba diving near a shipwreck and interacts with a local to understand the history and culture of Goa.

title: City Breaks
subTitle: Sabrina explores Salzburg, a picturesque city not just known for Mozart but also its beautiful churches, castles and palaces.

title: Xplore Spain
subTitle: Alex visits San Sebastián, one of Barcelona's oldest and most traditional beaches, and Camp Nou stadium, home to FC Barcelona. Later, she enjoys delicious seafood and strong sangrias.

title: World Heritage
subTitle: The presenter tells the tales of the Pattadakal temples, which are built by kings and claim their legitimacy from gods, before focusing on the legacy of sun worshippers.
